rationale: Educ. Code §30.056 governs funding sources for the Texas School for the Deaf. It does not reference Tax Code §11.13(b) or homestead exemption amounts. Any indirect fiscal impact via the available school fund is not a direct statutory conflict.
quote: the school's share of the available school fund and payments to compensate for payments no longer made from the available school fund as provided by Section 30.003(f).
_note: No direct conflict. Indirect fiscal linkage through available school fund is speculative and not a statutory conflict.
